calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-28-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Patricia M. Evezich #1193.
Petitioner was late, this matter was heard on the 02:00 pm. calendar.
Petitioner, Lorraine Ann Mortimer-Clark present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Raine Ann Mortimer.
Decree signed in open court.
